name: Salsa
recipeIngredient: 1 large can peeled tomatoes including the juice they were packed in (organic summer ones or canned winter ones are both good)
recipeInstructions:
1. Chop the tomatoes in a Cuisinart or other food processor and pour into a large bowl.
2. Chop the Anaheim pepper and pasilla pepper, then dump into the bowl.
3. Chop the Hungarian wax peppers, serrano peppers, garlic, cilantro, and green onions (by hand).
4. Add 2 tablespoons of balsamic vinegar and 1 teaspoon of cumin to the bowl.
5. Stir everything together.
6. Spoon the salsa into two large peanut-butter jars and refrigerate.
